HediffDef.label: Voxcaster
HediffDef.description: This pawn is using a vox backpack, allowing them to communicate with nearby pawns and increase their combat effectiveness.

HediffDef.label: Karskin-Voxcaster
HediffDef.description: This pawn is using a vox backpack, allowing them to communicate with nearby pawns and increase their combat effectiveness.

HediffDef.label: Voxcaster comms
HediffDef.description: This pawn is in range of a friendly pawn with a voxcaster. Their combat effectiveness is increased by their greater ability to communicate to one another.

HediffDef.label: Karskin-Voxcaster comms
HediffDef.description: This pawn is in range of a friendly pawn with a voxcaster. Their combat effectiveness is increased by their greater ability to communicate to one another.
